stage1_reason: The change replaces #ifdef CONFIG_PM conditional compilation with pm_ptr() macro usage, indicating adaptation to kernel's power management API changes for better code maintenance and bitrot protection.
stage2_reason: Driver commit removes #ifdef CONFIG_PM in favor of pm_ptr() macro, which was introduced/redefined in kernel commit c06ef740d401 exactly during the kernel lookup range (v5.16->v5.17). This matches the stage-1 reason about adapting to kernel's power management API changes for better maintenance and bitrot protection.
